title: Algoritmi e democrazia, il caso Meta secondo lo studio di UniUrb
snippet: Coverage regarding the public and political fallout after Professor Giglietto's Meta research was featured on Rai3's investigative program 'Report' in April 2026, sparking an official European Parliament inquiry and wider regulatory debates.
description: An article discussing the political and public fallout of Professor Giglietto's research on Meta's algorithms, including its feature on Rai3's 'Report' and subsequent European Parliament inquiries.

title: L'articolo 21 nella gabbia di Facebook
snippet: A journalistic analysis of free speech and online information dissemination. The article cites research by Fabio Giglietto tracking how Facebook's political content reduction policies impacted organic reach for Italian politicians.
description: An analytical article discussing the impact of Facebook's content moderation algorithms on free speech, citing research by Fabio Giglietto on how these policies affect the organic reach of Italian politicians.

description: An article covering Professor Fabio Giglietto's research analyzing over 2.5 million Facebook posts, focusing on how political extremist pages bypassed Meta's filters to gain visibility during elections.

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme
snippet: Reports on the political and legislative reactions in Italy triggered by Fabio Giglietto's research on Meta's algorithmic changes. The article features his research showing that Meta's political filters heavily penalized institutional politicians, prompting Italian political parties (PD and FdI) to discuss a bipartisan bill to regulate social media platforms.
description: An Italian news article reporting on the legislative reactions to Fabio Giglietto's research regarding the impact of Meta's algorithmic changes on political content.
